_comment: XP required to go from level L to L+1 (index 0 = level 1->2). Source: TBH wiki, ported
from the reference app (public/engine/gamedata.js DB.levels). Per the project data policy
this is CONTENT, not a live-readable numeric game parameter -- there is no single memory
address holding "the level curve"; it can only be checked by observing real level-ups.
NOT YET VERIFIED against the game. HeroLevelUpLog exists in LogManager.LOG_LIST (seen live:
40 entries in one scan) and would give game-authoritative XP-at-levelup if its field
offsets were added to data/meter-offsets.json -- same pattern as StageClearLog. Until then,
treat any levelUpETA computed from this table with the same caution as an unverified scale.
